entity.label: Julia
entity.subtitle: Female
entity.description: A Christian woman at Rome to whom Paul sent his salutations (Rom. 16:15), supposed to be the wife of Philologus.

nodes.label: Julia
nodes.description: A Christian woman at Rome to whom Paul sent his salutations (Rom. 16:15), supposed to be the wife of Philologus.

verses.text: Salute Philologus, and Julia, Nereus, and his sister, and Olympas, and all the saints which are with them.
